title: askellia elegans
intro: Askellia elegans, also known as blue daisy or blue mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Askellia elegans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. The herbal preparations of Askellia elegans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively in traditional medicine.
